checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #263 requested a documentation/spec module with README, spec YAML, prompts, n8n workflow skeleton, examples, contract, scope, final report, and Codex audit. The files are present in the declared scope.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The module defines reusable inputs, outputs, workflow, acceptance criteria, blocked scope, prompts, examples, and conceptual WhatsApp and Mercado Pago handoffs only.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The work is documentation/specification only and does not add provider setup, payment processing, production deployment, CI/CD changes, dependency installation, secrets, or provider connection values.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No secrets, private keys, production settings, payment links, or live provider configuration are included.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are restricted to modules/story-sales-engine and declared .specbridge evidence artifacts for issue #263.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The n8n workflow JSON parse check passed, all SpecBridge evidence validators passed, git diff --check passed, and ./scripts/specbridge-smoke.ps1 passed.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #263 is documentation/specification only and has complete local validation evidence. Repository PR CI remains a separate branch merge gate before merging to main.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records that the module is not a live publisher and that provider integrations remain future dedicated scope.

findings.evidence: The module intentionally does not configure live Instagram, WhatsApp, or Mercado Pago providers.
findings.recommendation: Use a future dedicated contract before adding provider setup, publishing, or payment processing.

unresolved_risks: The module is not a live publisher.
Live provider integrations remain future dedicated scope.
